channel.title: NPR Topics: Business
channel.description: Find the latest business news with reports on Wall Street, interest rates, banking, companies, and U.S. and world financial markets. Subscribe to the Business Story of the Day podcast.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: An Arkansas manufacturer pins hope on apprenticeships
item.description: Virco Manufacturing has made school furniture since 1950. Now with competition from imports and an aging workforce, Virco is hoping to build the workforce it needs to survive through apprenticeships.
item.content:encoded: Virco Manufacturing has made school furniture since 1950. Now with competition from imports and an aging workforce, Virco is hoping to build the workforce it needs to survive through apprenticeships.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: The candy heir vs. chocolate skimpflation
item.description: The grandson of the Reese's Peanut Butter Cups creator has launched a campaign against The Hershey Company, which owns the Reese's brand. He wants them to stop skimping on ingredients.
item.content:encoded: The grandson of the Reese's Peanut Butter Cups creator has launched a campaign against The Hershey Company, which owns the Reese's brand. He wants them to stop skimping on ingredients.
item.dc:creator: Greg Rosalsky

item.title: Oil prices surge, but no panic yet, as Iran war continues
item.description: Global oil prices are in the high $70s as traffic through Strait of Hormuz comes to a halt. Some analysts have warned they could top $100 a barrel if the stoppage is prolonged.
item.content:encoded:
Global oil prices are in the high $70s as traffic through Strait of Hormuz comes to a halt. Some analysts have warned they could top $100 a barrel if the stoppage is prolonged.

(Image credit: Fadel Senna)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last?
item.description: When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years. But battery lifespans are exceeding expectations.
item.content:encoded:
When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years. But battery lifespans are exceeding expectations.

(Image credit: Odd Andersen)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Prediction market trader 'Magamyman' made $553,000 on death of Iran's supreme leader
item.description: It's the latest trade drawing scrutiny on the popular prediction market site for appearing to show an insider making profits on military secrets.
item.content:encoded:
It's the latest trade drawing scrutiny on the popular prediction market site for appearing to show an insider making profits on military secrets.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: Oil prices rise sharply in market trading after attacks in Middle East disrupt supply
item.description: The high prices came as U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. military installations around the Gulf sent disruptions through the global energy supply chain.
item.content:encoded:
The high prices came as U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. military installations around the Gulf sent disruptions through the global energy supply chain.

(Image credit: Kamran Jebreili)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: How war in Iran could impact global energy markets
item.description: The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, a major oil producer, threatens to impact oil and natural gas markets worldwide.
item.content:encoded: The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, a major oil producer, threatens to impact oil and natural gas markets worldwide.
item.dc:creator: Julia Simon

item.title: Paramount outbids Netflix to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery for $111 billion
item.description: Paramount has outbid Netflix to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, a major shake-up that has many in the film industry worried.
item.content:encoded: Paramount has outbid Netflix to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, a major shake-up that has many in the film industry worried.

item.title: How could the U.S. war in Iran affect the world's oil supply?
item.description: Despite sanctions, Iran is one of the world's major oil producers, with much of its crude exported to China.
item.content:encoded:
Despite sanctions, Iran is one of the world's major oil producers, with much of its crude exported to China.

(Image credit: SAM/Middle East Images)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Local 'All Things Considered' host Alex Crichton signs off after 42 years at WXXI
item.description: WXXI News' Alex Crichton is retiring Friday, after 42 years at the station and hosting All Things Considered in Rochester, N.Y.
item.content:encoded: WXXI News' Alex Crichton is retiring Friday, after 42 years at the station and hosting All Things Considered in Rochester, N.Y.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel J. Sánchez
